hero.heading: We're More Than Your Accountants
hero.subheading: A dedicated team of financial specialists based in Amsterdam, committed to your long-term success.

story.heading: Built on Trust, Driven by Clarity
story.para1: Servicium was founded with one mission: to make financial services genuinely personal. We believed — and still believe — that everyone deserves a financial partner who explains things clearly, listens carefully, and delivers results.
story.para2: Based in Amsterdam, we work with individuals, freelancers, expats, and growing businesses. Whether you need monthly bookkeeping or help navigating the 30% ruling, we bring the same level of dedication and expertise to every engagement.

team.name: Jan van den Berg
team.bio: 10+ years of Dutch tax law expertise. Specialises in business tax and financial planning.

team.name: Anna Müller
team.bio: Former expat herself — Anna understands the complexities of navigating Dutch tax as a foreigner.

team.name: David Smit
team.bio: Meticulous and detail-oriented, David ensures every cent is accounted for accurately.

team.name: Laura Klaassen
team.bio: Strategic thinker who helps clients model their financial future with confidence.

faq.question: Do you work with both businesses and individuals?
faq.answer: Yes. We work with sole traders (eenmanszaak), BVs, freelancers, and private individuals — including expats at all stages of their Dutch financial journey.

faq.question: What is the 30% ruling and do I qualify?
faq.answer: The 30% ruling is a Dutch tax advantage for highly skilled migrants, allowing 30% of your salary to be paid tax-free. Eligibility depends on salary level, role, and residency history. We assess your situation and handle the application end-to-end.

faq.question: How quickly do you respond to queries?
faq.answer: We aim to respond to all client emails within one business day. For urgent matters, we always make time to help — our clients frequently tell us our responsiveness is one of our best qualities.

faq.question: What software do you use?
faq.answer: We use modern cloud-based accounting tools including Exact Online and Moneybird, depending on your needs. We ensure seamless integration with your existing systems.

faq.question: Is the first consultation really free?
faq.answer: Absolutely — no strings attached. The first 30-minute call is completely free. We use it to understand your situation and see if we're the right fit. Book directly via our calendar link.

cta.heading: Let's Work Together
cta.text: Get in touch today and discover how Servicium can simplify your financial life.
